descripcion: Estima el riesgo de sangrado mayor a 1 año en pacientes con fibrilación auricular bajo tratamiento anticoagulante. Ayuda a identificar factores de riesgo potencialmente reversibles antes de iniciar o durante la terapia.

referencias.titulo: A Novel User-Friendly Score (HAS-BLED) To Assess 1-Year Risk of Major Bleeding in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation. CHEST 2010.

Comparative validation of a novel risk score for predicting bleeding risk in anticoagulated patients with atrial fibrillation: the HAS-BLED (Hypertension, Abnormal Renal/Liver Function, Stroke, Bleeding History or Predisposition, Labile INR, Elderly, Drugs/Alcohol Concomitantly) score.
The HAS-BLED Score for Predicting Major Bleeding Risk in Anticoagulated Patients With Atrial Fibrillation: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis

resultados.approach: Precaución extrema; corregir activamente los factores reversibles.
